title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama: browser & Node.js support, streaming, embeddings.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component with LangChain abstractions.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat interface, model management, multi-user, markdown, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama: sync & async APIs, streaming, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: generate, chat, embed, pull, list models with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for Ollama: fuzzy model search, conversation history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension: use Ollama models as inline copilot with customizable prompts and shortcuts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, PVC, and service exposure.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama, supports slash commands, system prompts, and model swap.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama: threaded replies, app mentions, model picker, rate limiting.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for building & running Ollama with CUDA/rocm support and declarative model cache.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama + Chroma: ingest PDFs, embed, and chat with local docs.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service wrapper around Ollama exposing OpenAI-compatible chat/completions endpoints.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI for Ollama: sidebar model picker, chat history export, markdown rendering.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU auto-shutdown and model preload.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama: strongly-typed client, async tokio, serde models.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama: supports .NET 6+, async streaming, embeddings, DI-friendly.
